abi: error OracleDeviationExceeded(uint256 actual, uint256 expected, uint256 bps)
error StalePriceData(uint256 updatedAt, uint256 currentTime, uint256 maxStalePeriod)
event AddToDepositQueue(address asset, address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 amount, uint256 fee, bytes32 indexed id)
event AddToPendingRedeemQueue(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 tokenAmount, uint256 shareAmount, bytes32 indexed id)
event CancelPendingRedeem(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 shareAmount, bytes32 indexed id)
event CancelProcessDeposit(address asset, address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 netAssets, uint256 feeAmt, bytes32 indexed id)
event CancelProcessRedeem(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 netAmount, uint256 feeAmt, bytes32 indexed id)
event DepositEscrowIn(address indexed account, address indexed asset, uint256 amount)
event DepositEscrowOut(address indexed account, address indexed asset, uint256 amount)
event KycManagerUpdated(address indexed oldManager, address indexed newManager)
event OffRamp(address indexed to, uint256 amount)
event OffchainRedeem(address indexed from, address indexed to, address indexed asset, uint256 tokenAmount, uint256 shareAmount)
event ProcessDeposit(address asset, address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 netAssets, uint256 mintedAmount, uint256 feeAmt, bytes32 indexed id)
event ProcessPendingRedeem(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 shareAmount, uint256 priceUsed, bytes32 indexed pendingId, bytes32 finalId)
event ProcessRedeem(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 burnedAmount, uint256 redeemAssetOut, bytes32 indexed id)
event RedeemEscrowIn(address indexed account, uint256 amount)
event RedeemEscrowOut(address indexed account, uint256 amount)
event RevertRedeemToPending(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 tokenAmount, bytes32 indexed oldRedeemId, bytes32 newPendingId)
event RoleAdminChanged(bytes32 indexed role, bytes32 indexed previousAdminRole, bytes32 indexed newAdminRole)
event RoleGranted(bytes32 indexed role, address indexed account, address indexed sender)
event RoleRevoked(bytes32 indexed role, address indexed account, address indexed sender)
event UpdateEpoch(uint256 dailyFeeShares, uint256 dailyFeeTokens, uint256 offchainShares)
event UpdateFirstDeposit(address indexed account, bool flag)
event UpdateOffchainShares(address indexed caller, uint256 newValue, uint256 previousValue)
event UpdateRedeemAsset(address indexed oldAsset, address indexed newAsset)
function convertFromUnderlying(address _token, uint256 _amount) view returns (uint256 amount)
function convertToUnderlying(address _token, uint256 _amount) view returns (uint256 amount)
function getDepositQueueInfo(uint256 _index) view returns (address asset, address sender, address receiver, uint256 netAssets, uint256 feeAmt, bytes32 id)
function getPendingRedeemQueueInfo(uint256 _index) view returns (address sender, address receiver, uint256 tokenAmount, uint256 shareAmount, uint256 requestTimestamp, bytes32 id)

function getRedeemQueueInfo(uint256 _index) view returns (address sender, address receiver, uint256 tokenAmount, uint256 shareAmount, uint256 redeemAssetAmt, uint256 feeAssetAmt, uint256 requestTimestamp, bytes32 id)
function getRoleMember(bytes32 role, uint256 index) view returns (address)
function hasRole(bytes32 role, address account) view returns (bool)

function initialize(address _token, address _redeemAsset, address _treasury, address _txFeeTo, address _mgtFeeTo, address admin, address _assetRegistry, address _priceOracle, uint256 _maxStalePeriod, (uint256 depositMinimum, uint256 redeemMinimum, uint256 firstDepositAmount) cfg, address _kycManager, uint256 _depositMaxDeviationBps, uint256 _redeemMaxDeviationBps)
function previewDeposit(address _asset, uint256 _amount) view returns (uint256 netAmt, uint256 feeAmt, uint256 netMintAmt)
function previewRedeem(uint256 _tokenAmount) view returns (uint256 feeAmt, uint256 redeemAssetAmt, uint256 netRedeemAssetAmt)
function txsFee(uint256 _amount, uint8 _txType) view returns (uint256 feeAmt)
function upgradeToAndCall(address newImplementation, bytes data) payable
